Operation 'transformImage' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity on what transformations are available, what the options parameter contains, and what specific headers are returned. Added details about transformation types, parameter semantics, and response format for better AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Fetches a remote image, applies the specified transformations, and returns the processed image with appropriate headers.
data.summary_suggestion: Fetch, transform, and serve remote image
data.description_suggestion: Fetches a remote image from the provided URL, applies transformations specified in the options parameter (resizing, cropping, compression), and returns the processed image with appropriate Content-Type and caching headers. The options parameter defines the transformation pipeline. Returns the transformed image binary data.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on what transformations are available, what the options parameter contains, and what specific headers are returned. Added details about transformation types, parameter semantics, and response format for better AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getTransformedImagePath' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is unclear about the operation's purpose. Description lacks context about why this operation exists (caching/retrieval use case), what the options parameter contains, and response format. Added clarity on use case, transformation types, and response structure to help AI agents understand when to use this versus transformImage.

data.current_summary: Get absolute path of transformed image
data.current_description: Processes the image and returns the absolute file path of the result as a string in the response body.
data.description_suggestion: Processes the remote image according to the specified transformation options and returns the absolute file system path where the transformed image is cached. Useful for retrieving the cached result location without downloading the image binary. The options parameter defines the transformation pipeline (resizing, cropping, compression). Returns a JSON response containing the file path string.
data.reasoning: Original summary is unclear about the operation's purpose. Description lacks context about why this operation exists (caching/retrieval use case), what the options parameter contains, and response format. Added clarity on use case, transformation types, and response structure to help AI agents understand when to use this versus transformImage.

data.current_description: Accepts an image via POST (binary or base64 JSON) and applies the specified transformations.
data.description_suggestion: Accepts an image file via POST request in binary or base64-encoded JSON format. Applies transformations specified in the options parameter (resizing, cropping, compression) to the uploaded image. Returns the transformed image binary data with appropriate Content-Type headers. Supports both multipart/form-data and application/json request formats.
